message:
feat(core,pager,e2e): connection refinements, pager improvements, and comprehensive benchmark matrix expansion

- Refine connection-level schema refresh and prepared statement paths
  with improved lightweight vs full reload classification
- Pager improvements for WAL commit sync policy and transaction handling
- Major expansion of complete_benchmark_matrix e2e tests with additional
  workload scenarios and profiling coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
